title: client@1
description: A client or agent identity. Matched against incoming requests to enforce route-level access control. See [components](../components.md#client).

config.description: Identity matching rules applied to incoming requests

match.description: Rules used to identify this client at runtime. An empty match object matches all requests (anonymous).

headers.description: Header key-value pairs that must all be present on the request

allowedRoutes.description: Ingress route paths this client is permitted to access. Use "*" to allow all routes.
